mechanism_narrative: A persistent upward trajectory in real GDP growth reduces recession risk premiums, directly lifting equity valuations over the subsequent month. This trend operates continuously regardless of absolute levels.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns show no positive correlation with rising GDPC1 trends over a 5-year rolling window, or the Rank IC drops below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering risk-off positioning and compressing equity multiples within a single week.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.2 percentage points in 1 month
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns remain positive or neutral when UNRATE spikes above the 0.2pp threshold in more than 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: The joint contraction of industrial production and housing starts indicates a synchronized demand shock that overwhelms monetary accommodation, forcing a sharp repricing of cyclical equities.
failure_condition: The interaction term between INDPRO and HOUST declines shows no predictive power for negative 20-day returns, with a joint t-statistic below 1.96.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 2.5%, real rates turn positive and compress equity duration, leading to negative forward returns over a full quarter.
failure_condition: Equity forward returns remain positive or statistically indistinguishable from zero when real rates are positive over a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Steady month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls sustains consumer spending power, providing a continuous floor for corporate earnings and supporting positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day forward returns do not correlate with PAYEMS growth rates exceeding 150,000 jobs per month over any 4-year rolling period.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained surge in retail sales volume reflects aggressive consumer leverage and spending, which historically precedes earnings revisions and drives short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns fail to outperform the baseline when RSAFS breaches the 3% threshold, yielding a negative information coefficient.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where industrial production rises while unemployment falls simultaneously indicates a supply-side productivity boom that expands profit margins and lifts equity valuations over a quarter.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises while UNRATE falls in consecutive months
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising INDPRO and falling UNRATE produces negative or flat 60-day forward returns in more than 50% of historical instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rapidly rising housing permits anticipate future construction activity and economic growth, acting as a leading indicator that boosts equity prices over a one-week horizon before broader data confirms the trend.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns are negative or zero when HOUST surges above the 2% monthly threshold, invalidating the leading indicator premise.
